subject: FW: lsj project
body:
From: Jose Goncalves [mailto:jgoncalves447@hawks.rwu.edu] 
Sent: Sunday, March 16, 2008 12:48 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: lsj project

 

 

 hello Leslie,

Hope all is well.  This is Jose Goncalves.  I am not sure if you
remember me, but i did work along with Hasan Khan on the LSJ project a
few years ago.  I have not kept in touch with Jeffrey in quiet a long
time and wanted to catch up and see how things were progressing.  Please
send him my regards.  I have also decided after several years of working
in a large firm to explore new opportunities in architecture.  I am not
sure which projects are under exploration, but if Jeffrey is in need of
any help architecturally, please inform him i  would love to catch a
moment of his time and catch up, even if its to say hi and grab a bite.
thank you!
regards
Jose Goncalves
body_html:
From: Jose Goncalves [mailto:jgoncalves447@hawks.rwu.edu]
Sent: Sunday, March 16, 2008 12:48 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: lsj project

 

 

 hello Leslie,

Hope all is well.  This is Jose Goncalves.  I am not sure if you remember me, but i did work along with Hasan Khan on the LSJ project a few years ago.  I have not kept in touch with Jeffrey in quiet a long time and wanted to catch up and see how things were progressing.  Please send him my regards.  I have also decided after several years of working in a large firm to explore new opportunities in architecture.  I am not sure which projects are under exploration, but if Jeffrey is in need of any help architecturally, please inform him i  would love to catch a  moment of his time and catch up, even if its to say hi and grab a bite.  thank you!
regards
Jose Goncalves
